frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Bro honestly shaadi scene is becoming risky for guys now. One divorce and half your income is gone, plus these one-sided laws like 498A are always hanging over your head. Aajkal prenup sounds less like distrust and more like basic self-protection, because too many people are marrying for stability and then acting like alimony is their right.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women as financially exploitative in marriage and divorce while presenting men as the primary victims of biased laws. It encodes victimhood inversion, legal-system grievance around 498A, and the idea of prenups as protection from supposedly gold-digging women.
original_frame: Misogyny Jokes: Period, Hormones and Mood.
persona_text: You are Kartik. Age 22. A college student in Delhi University. You are posting anonymously on your college's confession page on Instagram after your female professor gave your entire class surprise extra assignments this week. You are writing a post about it and making a joke about her mood and the timing.
